response:
A business description for a Google My Business profile aimed at first-time home buyers and home buyers in Orlando, Florida, can be rewritten as follows:

**Business Description:**  
Established in 2002, Paul Giles & The Vintage Team at Compass is a real estate agency dedicated to providing expert guidance to homeowners and business owners throughout central Florida. We specialize in assisting both sellers and buyers with commercial and private homes, offering comprehensive support in all aspects of real estate and financing. Our goal is to build and maintain long-term relationships with our clients, ensuring a reliable and trustworthy experience throughout their real estate journey. We serve multiple locations in Orlando, including Conway, Orlando, Maitland, Winter Park, Windermere, Altamonte Springs, Delaney Park, Lake Nona Region, and Lancaster Park.
